description_long: This is a pair of open-toe, flat sandals featuring wide, overlapping brown leather straps across the front and midfoot, with a single strap wrapping around the heel and fastening at the side. The sandals have a minimalist design, with no visible logos or embellishments, and the straps are smooth and matte in appearance. The footbed appears to be lightly cushioned and matches the color of the straps, while the outsole is thin and slightly lighter in tone, likely made of a flexible material. The construction suggests comfort and breathability, suitable for warm weather and casual urban environments. The sandals are designed for easy slip-on wear, with a buckle closure at the ankle for added security. The overall look is simple, functional, and stylish, making them versatile for everyday use.
description: A pair of brown, open-toe flat sandals with wide overlapping leather straps and a buckle ankle closure, featuring a minimalist and comfortable design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-toe design and overlapping straps across the forefoot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat sole, wide straps, and ankle buckle closure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel straps and the back of the footbed.
description_view_3: Angled side-rear view showing the strap arrangement and the thin, flat sole.
